---
title: "Chips from the Royal Image,  Being fragments of the Eikon Basilike of Charles I.  Arranged by A. E. M. Anderson Morshead.  Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Chips from the Royal Image,  Being fragments of the Eikon Basilike of Charles I.  Arranged by A. E. M. Anderson Morshead.  Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1887
**Genre:** Non-fiction: edition (by another)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London: J. Masters & Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
